description: All rails grouped by power state (sleep domain). PMU naming: SERA=Master (U8100), SIMETRA=Slave (U7700).
WARNING: M1 board (A2337 / 820-02016). Power domain structure differs from M2. No MagSafe. SERA/SIMETRA PMU naming convention. External AON LDOs (UC100/UC120) are separate from PMU LDOs.

domains.name: G3H
domains.description: Present whenever AC power is connected (pre-charger, pre-battery). USB-C cable inserted (no MagSafe on this model).

domains.name: AON
domains.description: Always on when battery or charger connected. Stays up in all sleep states.
domains.pmu: U5700 (SVR AON) + UC100 (3.3V LDO) + UC120 (1.8V LDO) + SERA LDO9 (U8100) + SIMETRA LDO9 (U7700)

domains.name: SLEEP3
domains.description: Deep sleep retention. Minimal power for critical SRAM retention.

domains.name: SLEEP2
domains.description: Light sleep. Memory retention active. Most peripherals off.

domains.name: SLEEP1
domains.description: Lighter sleep. Core SoC domains retained.

domains.name: SLP_S2R
domains.description: S2 retention domain. Active during S2 sleep for state retention.

domains.name: S2
domains.description: System standby. Standalone VRs active. Peripherals powered.

domains.name: SW_CTRL
domains.description: Software controlled rails. Enabled/disabled by SoC firmware on demand.

domains.name: S0_AWAKE
domains.description: Fully awake. SoC running, display on, all dynamic DVFS domains active.
domains.pmu: U8100 (SERA BUCK0/7/11, LDO9/10, SW1/3) + U7700 (SIMETRA BUCK6/12/13/14, LDO9/10)

domains.name: NC_SPARE
domains.description: Not connected or spare PMU outputs.
